name: Pente
author: Gary Gabrel (1977) / AGP
description: Pente (Gary Gabrel, 1977): five-in-a-row with custodial pair captures. Place stones to make a line of five or more, OR capture five pairs of enemy stones. A stone placed to bracket exactly two enemy stones (you-enemy-enemy-you) removes that pair; placing your own pair between two enemies is safe. Black moves first; 13/15/19 boards.
